# sdwan_application_priority_policy_settings_policy (Data Source)

This data source can read the Application Priority Policy Settings Policy.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sdwan_application_priority_policy_settings_policy" "example" {
  id                 = "f6b2c44c-693c-4763-b010-895aa3d236bd"
  feature_profile_id = "f6dd22c8-0b4f-496c-9a0b-6813d1f8b8ac"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `feature_profile_id` (String) Feature Profile ID
- `id` (String) The id of the Policy

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the Policy
- `ipv4_application_visibility` (Boolean) Application Visibility
- `ipv4_flow_visibility` (Boolean) Flow Visibility
- `ipv6_application_visibility` (Boolean) Application Visibility IPv6
- `ipv6_flow_visibility` (Boolean) Flow Visibility IPv6
- `name` (String) The name of the Policy
- `version` (Number) The version of the Policy
